lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Oh... nilsal, adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How are you, Astra?

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Not great... Can you believe what they've done?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Done what?

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Are you blind? Look what they've done to the altar of Ralos!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh... I guess it has seen better days.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: It was those others! Those undead druids. Blind moon worshippers...

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Do you see what they've become? That's what turning your back on the light does. Even as I stand here in this desecrated temple, I feel the light fading from me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose it is quite spooky down here.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: So you feel it too? A shadow hangs over this place.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What will you do now?

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: My mission is still a secret, adventurer. Perhaps I'll share it with you one day.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Ah, nilsal! Hello!

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Ah, hello again!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello to you too!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me about yourself.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: I'm a Knight of Varlamore, the Kingdom of Sun. I venture to Kourend on a mission, one I can say very little of.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come?

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: I'm afraid you must accept my secrecy adventurer, for who knows what the future holds.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found an ancient sun temple.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Oh, pray tell, where is this temple?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In a place called the Forthos Ruin to the south east of here. I was exploring there and I discovered symbology for an entity called Ralos.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: I see. I think I shall check out this ruin. Thank you for letting me know adventurer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem... Oh, I don't know your name.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Call me Astra! Now, I must see this discovery for myself. It may well help with my mission here. May the light shine upon you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where's the Kingdom of Varlamore?

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: To the south, beyond Mount Quidamortem. It's a glorious land where the sun forever shines.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds wonderful!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Knight of Varlamore
lines.text: Stay vigilant, friend.
